goal: Stop the blocking 'Share data is too large' alert on every Celtic Cross share
done: Replaced the alert() in openSharePage's oversized-payload branch with a non-blocking showTemporaryToast in js/reading.js.
symptom: After routing the 10-card Celtic Cross result through the poster share flow, every share popped a blocking alert ('Share data is too large...') because the payload always exceeds the hash limit.
root_cause: openSharePage used a blocking alert() to inform the user of the oversized-payload fallback link; fine for the rare 1-3 card case, jarring now that Celtic always hits it.
fix: Swap alert() for showTemporaryToast(); navigation into the share page proceeds immediately. Error-path alert (missing reading data) left as-is.
affects: all oversized-payload shares (Celtic Cross in particular)
filed: Celtic share still uses a sessionStorage fallback (bare /share/ URL, no #p= link) — image shares fine but a copied link won't reproduce the reading for a friend; payload-slim is the deeper fix
Celtic poster bottom reading text unreadable (small/low-contrast 3-panel insights) — redesign pending
